etymology.description: 屮 ("sprout") + 六 (phonetic) -> phonetic component -> fell into disuse
etymology.interpretation: 𡴆 was originally a phono-semantic compound used for its phonetic properties, combining the semantic element 屮 (chū, "sprout") with the phonetic component 六 (lù). It fell out of use when the character 𡴆 transformed into 夌 (líng) and the original character's function changed.
